candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears as a component nested under the selected parent row 'Cost of sales' alongside other sub-lines such as balancing value and staff costs, so adding it separately would likely double count.

Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it is presented as a sub-component of the selected 'Cost of sales' bucket rather than a separate same-level operating expense line, so it appears already embedded in COGS.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. The visible D&A lines for cost of sales sit beneath that parent and look like components of the total, not separate same-level expenses to add later. Conservative choice avoids double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Sales, distribution and marketing expenses

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is the combination of 'Sales, distribution and marketing expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses'. The D&A rows shown for both buckets are subordinate component lines under those selected parents. No separate R&D row is visible, and XRD is empty, so no special R&D D&A extraction applies here.
